pi_items.verified_value: DEFAULT_WELCOME_PAGE_TITLE is not a standard Jitsi Meet interface_config.js parameter
pi_items.source: GitHub raw interface_config.js (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jitsi/jitsi-meet/master/interface_config.js) - only DEFAULT_WELCOME_PAGE_LOGO_URL exists, no DEFAULT_WELCOME_PAGE_TITLE

pi_items.verified_value: Default SETTINGS_SECTIONS in Jitsi Meet is ['devices', 'language', 'moderator', 'profile', 'calendar', 'sounds', 'more']
MOBILE_APP_PROMO defaults to true in Jitsi Meet interface_config.js
pi_items.source: GitHub raw interface_config.js (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jitsi/jitsi-meet/master/interface_config.js) shows: MOBILE_APP_PROMO: true
Task description states 'Save the screenshot to ~/Documents/restricted_settings.png', env.json specifies user account 'ga'

pi_items.verified_value: Docker Jitsi Meet uses /config/interface_config.js (primary) or /defaults/interface_config.js (fallback). /usr/share/jitsi-meet/interface_config.js is the package path, not typical Docker path
pi_items.source: docker-jitsi-meet GitHub issues #275, export_result.sh script tries both /usr/share/jitsi-meet/interface_config.js and /defaults/interface_config.js

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Jitsi Meet's interface_config.js file in a Docker container. SETTINGS_SECTIONS should be modified from the default ['devices', 'language', 'moderator', 'profile', 'calendar', 'sounds', 'more'] to contain only ['devices', 'sounds']. MOBILE_APP_PROMO should be set to false (default is true). The screenshot proof should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/restricted_settings.png. However, DEFAULT_WELCOME_PAGE_TITLE is not a standard Jitsi Meet configuration parameter in interface_config.js - only DEFAULT_WELCOME_PAGE_LOGO_URL exists.
